## Summary

Brief description of the changes and motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`lein test :only rama-sail.sail.optimizer-test rama-sail.sail.adapter-test`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`lein test`) if topology or module changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No breaking changes to stable API, or discussed and approved
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated for new public functions
